colors.name: tube-black
colors.role: background — the unlit tube; every other color exists against it

colors.name: phosphor
colors.role: primary text, cursor, focus ring, ASCII bright band (14.5:1 on tube-black)

colors.name: phosphor-dim
colors.role: secondary text — phosphor at 72% alpha composited over tube-black (7.2:1)

colors.name: dim-trace
colors.role: decorative only: rules, section numerals, faint ASCII cells (2.4:1 — never functional text)

colors.name: amber-alert
colors.role: the one flagged log entry and the retired dish status (10.6:1)

colors.name: glass-glare
colors.role: CRT glare washes at ≤7% alpha; full strength only as momentary ASCII peak glints

fonts.role: Latin display and log type — the voice of the tube (also the canvas ASCII glyphs)
Korean monospace at 0.8em — the operator's hand; Hangul falls through VT323 into it

texture: Fixed full-viewport CRT sandwich in three layers: repeating-linear-gradient scanlines (1px of rgba(3,8,4,0.28) ink every 3px), a radial glass-glare wash (rgba(200,255,217,0.07) from top center) that breathes twice per 9.4s cycle, and a radial vignette falling to rgba(2,5,3,0.5) at the corners; beneath the glass, the content layer stumbles horizontally for a single frame once per 12.4s (translateX 3px + skewX -0.6deg). All of it dies under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: ease-out-signal
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — reveals: fast in, long tail

motion.name: boot-char-cadence
motion.value: 9ms + 0–12ms jitter per tick; 35% of ticks emit 2 chars (UART burst)

motion.name: boot-line-pause
motion.value: 140ms + 0–160ms; ×3.5 dramatic beat before the sign-off line

motion.name: title-bloom
motion.value: 950ms ease-crt, keyframed brightness(3.5→1) / blur(10px→0) with two collapses

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 600ms ease-out-signal, translateY(16px) → 0, 70ms stagger per observer batch

motion.name: energy-attack / energy-release
motion.value: 0.06 / 0.025 per 60fps-normalized frame — quick to notice you, slow to forget
